---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement (new transfer mode, API, benchmark, etc.)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the project doesn't support today?

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it touches the wire protocol, the cuObject API usage, or
the deploy bundle, describe how.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, related issues, hardware constraints.
